is_idle.description: Tests if one or more Assist satellites are idle.
is_idle.name: Satellite is idle

is_listening.description: Tests if one or more Assist satellites are listening.
is_listening.name: Satellite is listening

is_processing.description: Tests if one or more Assist satellites are processing.
is_processing.name: Satellite is processing

is_responding.description: Tests if one or more Assist satellites are responding.
is_responding.name: Satellite is responding

announce.description: Lets an Assist satellite announce a message.

media_id.description: The media ID to announce instead of using text-to-speech.
media_id.name: Media ID

preannounce.description: Play a sound before the announcement.
preannounce.name: Preannounce

preannounce_media_id.description: Custom media ID to play before the announcement.
preannounce_media_id.name: Preannounce media ID

announce.name: Announce on satellite

ask_question.description: Lets an Assist satellite ask a question and get the user's response.

entity_id.description: Assist satellite entity to ask the question on.
entity_id.name: Entity

preannounce.description: Play a sound before the start message or media.
preannounce.name: Preannounce

preannounce_media_id.description: Custom media ID to play before the start message or media.
preannounce_media_id.name: Preannounce media ID

question_media_id.description: The media ID of the question to use instead of text-to-speech.
question_media_id.name: Question media ID

ask_question.name: Ask question on satellite

start_conversation.description: Starts a conversation from an Assist satellite.

extra_system_prompt.description: Provide background information to the AI about the request.
extra_system_prompt.name: Extra system prompt

preannounce.description: Play a sound before the start message or media.
preannounce.name: Preannounce

preannounce_media_id.description: Custom media ID to play before the start message or media.
preannounce_media_id.name: Preannounce media ID

start_media_id.description: The media ID to start with instead of using text-to-speech.
start_media_id.name: Media ID

start_conversation.name: Start conversation on satellite

idle.description: Triggers after one or more Assist satellites become idle after having processed a command.
idle.name: Satellite became idle

listening.description: Triggers after one or more Assist satellites start listening for a command from someone.
listening.name: Satellite started listening

processing.description: Triggers after one or more Assist satellites start processing a command after having heard it.
processing.name: Satellite started processing

responding.description: Triggers after one or more Assist satellites start responding to a command after having processed it, or start announcing something.
responding.name: Satellite started responding
